title: Alchemy Leaders of Tomorrow · Alchemy Leaders of Tomorrow_Factsheet.pdf
content:
Alchemy Leaders of Tomorrow, launched in January 2026, aims for long-term capital appreciation by investing in Indian companies demonstrating adaptability, innovation, and ingenuity. The fund invests in listed Indian equities, PIPES, and IPOs, seeking "Growth at a Reasonable Price."

As of December 31, 2025, the fund's AUM stood at INR 723 crores. Key portfolio holdings include Multi Commodity Exchange, One 97 Communications, and Avalon Technologies. Sector allocation is heavily weighted towards financials (29.89%) and consumer discretionary (22.08%), with a market cap allocation towards mid cap companies. The fund has underperformed against the BSE 500 over 1, 3, and 6 month periods.
